name: Container With A hostPath Mount Created
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Leo Tsaousis (@laripping)
SIGMA Title: Container With A hostPath Mount Created
SIGMA Description: Detects creation of a container with a hostPath mount.
A hostPath volume mounts a directory or a file from the node to the container.
Attackers who have permissions to create a new pod in the cluster may create one with a writable hostPath volume and chroot to escape to the underlying node.


False positives:
- The DaemonSet controller creates pods with hostPath volumes within the kube-system namespace.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%create%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pods%' AND UTF8(payload) LIKE '%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Container With A hostPath Mount Created on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%create%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pods%' AND UTF8(payload) LIKE '%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Container With A hostPath Mount Created
